title: Â£63 Million Lift-off for Clean Aviation Fuels
content: 17 UK companies developing sustainable aviation fuel will receive share of new Â£63 million funding boost. The latest investment builds on this yearâ€™s sustainable aviation fuel (SAF) drive, which will help position the UK as the world leader in homegrown sustainable aviation fuel production. It supports greenlighting of multiple airport expansion schemes to kickstart economic growth and deliver on UK's Plan for Change
author: Analysts Account
